title: LIHEAP - 211info
text: CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF GRAND RONDE LIHEAP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support to offset electric, natural gas, and heating fuel (oil, wood, propane, pellets). LIHEAP payments will be counted as utility assistance through the Social Services Emergency Assistance Program. If applicants have received LIHEAP funds as of October 1 through another agency, they are ineligible to apply. 9615 Grand Ronde Road Grand Ronde, OR 97347 Eligibility: -Members of the Confederated Tribes of Grand Ronde (CTGR) with household income at or below 60% median income -Adult Tribal Members name (adult CTGR tribal member who lives in the home) must be on billing statement or Authorized User on utility account -If no adult Tribal Member is in the home, family can still apply if there is a CTGR Tribal Member youth in the home. Must provide documentation of child living in the home. Hours: Website: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Program runs from October 1 until the last week of May or until capacity is reached Email (503) 879-2034 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 879-2034 Toll-free (800) 242-8196 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: All of the following documents are required: -Copy of Tribal ID -Copies of Social Security cards from all household members -Documentation of income for all household members for the last 30 days -An original or copy of current utility statement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Marion, Multnomah, Polk, Tillamook, Washington and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:45am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Turn right onto Grand Ronde Road from Highway 18. Drive one mile, then turn left onto the Tribal Campus. The Social Services department is located in Building B, the Community Center. The Education Division is in Building K. Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance * Native American Community Gas Service Payment Assistance * Native American Community Heating Fuel Payment Assistance * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - HEAD START HOUSING/SHELTER - RENTAL SUPPORT PROGRAM INFORMATION SERVICES - TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF GRAND RONDE
